context.statement: Launch an inclusive fashion brand that serves underrepresented body types and identities — making premium design accessible across sizes, genders, and budgets.

assumptions: Demand exists among underrepresented groups who currently find mainstream fashion exclusionary
Inclusive positioning is a durable competitive advantage, not a trend
A community-first launch model can substitute for paid acquisition in early stages

evidence.note: Actor stated the mission. Intent-grade only — no behavioral or outcome signal yet. Statement accuracy is unverified.

context.statement: Rebuild communication and trust as a couple after a period of conflict and emotional disconnection — by finding qualified therapy and sustaining it financially.

constraints: Limited availability of therapists accepting new clients
assumptions: Both partners are willing to engage
Weekly sessions for 6+ months are feasible

context.statement: Fund the final two years of an undergraduate degree in environmental science without taking on additional debt — through scholarships and grants matched to my profile.

assumptions: Application quality can be significantly improved with coaching
Early application cycle (Aug–Oct) is the primary window

context.statement: Secure $150,000 in non-dilutive financing within 6 months to open a second location of an independent bakery with 18 months of profitable operation.

constraints: Sole proprietor — personal and business finances mixed
No prior experience with grant applications
assumptions: Revenue history is sufficient to qualify for some SBA programs
Grant programs exist for food businesses in this county
Credit profile can be built within 3–4 months with guidance

context.statement: Reduce pedestrian and cyclist fatalities by 40% in the city's three highest-risk corridors within 3 years, using a data-driven Vision Zero approach.

constraints: Annual capital budget capped at $2M for safety improvements
Internal engineering capacity is limited — 2 FTEs
Council approval required for any road geometry change
assumptions: Accident data exists but is unstructured
Physical interventions are more effective than enforcement alone
Community co-design improves adoption and compliance

context.statement: Build a stable corps of 80 active volunteers who are matched to the right roles, supported through structured coordination, and retained for 12+ months — enabling the NGO to double its programme delivery.

constraints: No budget for paid coordination staff
Current tools are spreadsheet and WhatsApp group
Organisation has no experience with volunteer management software
assumptions: Free-tier volunteer platforms are sufficient for the first 6 months
Recognition and communication are the highest-leverage retention levers
